mapper.insert: insert into wallet_entry(entry_id, txn_id, account_id, direction, amount, balance_after) values(#{entryId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{txnId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{accountId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{direction}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter})
mapper.select: select entry_id, txn_id, account_id, direction, amount, balance_after, create_time from wallet_entry where txn_id = #{txnId, jdbcType=BINARY} order by entry_id asc
